UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and application-specific settings, excluding authentication details managed by an external system. This entity differentiates between 'user' and 'admin' account types.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

externalAuthId.description: Identifier from the external authentication system, linking this user profile to their authentication credentials.

username.description: Display name chosen by the user.

email.description: User's email address, used for communication and not for authentication within this system.

role.description: The role of the user within the application, determining access levels and permissions (e.g., 'user', 'admin').

isPremium.description: Indicates if the user has an active premium subscription to remove ads.

languagePreference.description: User's preferred language for the application interface (e.g., 'en' for English, 'ar' for Arabic).

themePreference.description: User's preferred color theme for the application interface (e.g., 'dark', 'light').

watchlistAnimeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Anime entities that the user has added to their personal watchlist.

favoriteAnimeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Anime entities that the user has favorited.

completedAnimeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Anime entities that the user has finished watching.

favoriteEpisodeIds.description: An array of unique identifiers for Episode entities that the user has favorited.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Anime.title: Anime
Anime.description: Represents an anime series available on the platform, including its metadata and general information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Anime entity.

titleEn.description: The main title of the anime series in English.

titleAr.description: The main title of the anime series in Arabic.

alternativeTitles.description: Optional list of alternative titles (e.g., Japanese names) for better searchability.

descriptionEn.description: A brief summary or synopsis of the anime's plot in English.

descriptionAr.description: A brief summary or synopsis of the anime's plot in Arabic.

releaseYear.description: The original release year of the anime series.

coverImage.description: URL to the primary poster image for the anime series.

bannerImage.description: URL to the banner image for the anime series.

genres.description: An array of genres associated with this anime.

rating.description: The calculated average rating for this anime.

views.description: The total number of views for this anime.

lastEpisodeNumber.description: The number of the most recently added episode.

status.description: The airing status of the anime.

type.description: The production type of the anime.

season.description: The release season of the anime.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the anime entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the anime entry was last updated.

Episode.title: Episode
Episode.description: Represents a single episode within an anime series, containing multiple streaming servers and metadata.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Episode entity.

animeId.description: Reference to the parent Anime entity.

episodeNumber.description: The sequential number of the episode.

titleEn.description: The title of the episode in English.

titleAr.description: The title of the episode in Arabic.

servers.description: A list of streaming servers for this episode.

thumbnail.description: URL to a thumbnail image for the episode.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the episode entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the episode entry was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles, preferences, and watchlist.

/admins/{adminId}.description: Dedicated collection for administrative role assignment.

/anime/{animeId}.description: Stores public information about anime series.

/ratings/{ratingId}.description: Stores individual user ratings for anime episodes.

/anime/{animeId}/episodes/{episodeId}/co.description: Stores user comments for specific anime episodes.
